constraintLeaderboard.description: Critical authentication and routing infrastructure failures causing 401/404 errors across the entire application
constraintLeaderboard.goal: Reliability of LIVE features — Clock-in/out, geofencing, scheduling, payroll reports, task assignment, and Clerk auth MUST work flawlessly
evidenceFromCrawl: GET /api/auth/session → 401 (auth check failing for legitimate users)
Multiple dashboard pages return empty/error states due to failed API calls
unblocks: Clock-in/out functionality becomes accessible to authenticated users
Schedule management and viewing becomes possible
Task assignment and tracking can function
Payroll report generation becomes available
Activity logging and audit trails work correctly
All dashboard and admin functionality becomes usable
constraintLeaderboard.dismissedReason: False positive — 401s from unauthenticated crawler, not real auth bugs

constraintLeaderboard.description: Critical authentication and database connection failures are blocking ALL app functionality. Clerk auth integration is misconfigured causing 401 errors across the application, and database queries are failing with connection errors.
constraintLeaderboard.goal: Reliability of LIVE features — Clock-in/out, geofencing, scheduling, payroll reports, task assignment, and Clerk auth MUST work flawlessly
evidenceFromCrawl: Multiple pages failing to load due to auth failures

Failed API requests returning 500 errors due to DB connection issues
Users unable to access protected routes
unblocks: Users can successfully log in and access the application
Clock-in/out functionality becomes accessible
Schedule viewing and task management becomes operational
Payroll reports can be generated
All API endpoints can serve authenticated requests
Database queries can execute successfully
constraintLeaderboard.dismissedReason: False positive — 401s from unauthenticated crawler, not real auth bugs

constraintLeaderboard.description: Geofencing validation is completely broken — employees can clock in from anywhere, violating legal time-tracking compliance requirements
constraintLeaderboard.goal: Reliability of LIVE features — Clock-in/out, geofencing, scheduling, payroll reports, task assignment, and Clerk auth MUST work flawlessly
evidenceFromCrawl: POST /api/time-entries/clock-in returns 200 success even when user is 5000+ meters from store location
Geofence validation function exists but result is ignored in the route handler
No error logging when geofence check fails
Database allows time_entries to be created without location verification
Employee can clock in from home, work 8 hours at store, clock out from home — system accepts all events
unblocks: Legal compliance for time tracking
Trust in payroll accuracy
Ability to enforce on-site work requirements
Foundation for future geo-based features (shift reminders, proximity alerts)
Manager confidence in reported work hours
constraintLeaderboard.dismissedReason: False positive — 401s from unauthenticated crawler, not real auth bugs

failedAttempts.constraint: Geofencing validation is completely broken — employees can clock in from anywhere, violating legal time-tracking compliance requirements
failedAttempts.reason: Geofencing validation constraint is NOT resolved. The constraint requires that POST /api/time-entries/clock-in returns 403 when user is >100m from store, but the codebase provided shows NO geofence validation implementation in the time entries route handler. The crawl verification only checks that pages load (which they do), but does NOT verify the actual geofence enforcement behavior. The re-crawl results show WebSocket connection failures and page load issues, but these are separate from the geofencing constraint. Critical: zero of the 6 planned steps have been completed.
